steps.title: Calculate the retail price from the wholesale price
steps.content:
The retail price is 290% of the wholesale price of $7.00.

$$\text{Retail price} = 290\% \times 7 = 2.9 \times 7 = 20.3 \text{ dollars}$$

steps.title: Apply the 80% discount to find the discounted price
steps.content:
A discount of 80% off means the customer pays only 20% of the retail price (since $100\% - 80\% = 20\%$).

$$\text{Discounted price} = 20\% \times 20.3 = 0.2 \times 20.3 = 4.06 \text{ dollars}$$

The discounted price of each souvenir is \$4.06.
